title: greed final
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] We are builders, makers, hoppers, doers from clunkers and junkers out of shards and clay.
[00:00:16.00] We shape and frame, sort and stir, each of us turning grime into gold.
[00:00:24.00] Against fence and lock, the doors move, a window opens, a sunset reaches for a fresh day.
[00:00:35.00] Everything is always growing.
[00:00:39.00] Dirt dusts places not yet alive and in this gravel of possibility we honor the old and warm,
[00:00:49.00] the faded and frail know that good bones are worth holding.
[00:00:55.00] Deep against rock trains, clack and roll.
[00:01:00.00] We press into paper, scissors and paint, splattered, gathered, mixed with each ding ding ding.
[00:01:07.00] Inside of quake, floats our dreams and we clatter, grind, awake in dark, in light, in love and hope.
[00:01:18.00] The day opens, the sky widens, you are here.
[00:01:22.00] Hand in hand, arm in arm, each trip is a dare to you declare dreams.
[00:01:28.00] Work, fear and sculpt, soul and hold, paint and saw.
[00:01:35.00] Mix and younger, break rules, break ground, create yourself.
[00:01:42.00] They won't, won now.
[00:01:45.00] Under bridges of the darkness we dance and dive, wonder, wonder, taste and make.
[00:01:53.00] We need you all and why and what next?
[00:01:57.00] We need you to build in the mine a step.
[00:02:02.00] The sky, the sky.
[00:02:32.00] The sky, the sky.
